== Test Workflow

Tests require Docker and Make. All tests run inside a containerized environment
with a real MediaWiki instance managed via `docker-compose.yml`.

*Full CI pipeline*

[source,console]
----
make ci
----

This runs: `make build` → `make up` (starts MediaWiki) → `make test-coverage` → `make down`.

*Step by step*

Build Docker images (defaults: `NODE_VERSION=18`, `MW_VERSION=1.43`):

[source,console]
----
make build
# or: NODE_VERSION=20 MW_VERSION=1.43 make build
----

Start the MediaWiki wiki container and wait until it is ready:

[source,console]
----
make up
----

Run lint (`grunt lint`) and integration tests with coverage (`grunt test-coverage`):

[source,console]
----
make test-coverage
----

Stop and remove containers:

[source,console]
----
make down
----

*Interactive shell*

Bash into the running mwbot container to run individual Grunt targets:

[source,console]
----
make bash
> npx grunt lint
> npx grunt mochacli
----

*Test matrix*

CI runs against multiple Node.js / MediaWiki version combinations.
See `.github/workflows/ci.yml` for the current matrix.
